# NLTF Revenue Model Workflow

## Revenue Architecture Overview

- **Metric:** Value | Metric | Value | Metric | Value
- **Workbook sheets:** 32 | Formula cells | 18848 | Formula error cells | 396
- **Modeled streams:** 3 | Standard release rows | 53 | Release-value rows | 33772
- **Annual source rows:** 378 | Annual model rows | 1554 | Future forecast rows | 7686
- **Root total:** Total NLTF revenue | Primary subtotal | Net FED + Net RUC | Crown top-up | Explicit toggle
- **Horizon policy:** H1–H12 supported | Long range | H13+ extrapolation | Raw workbook | Outside Git
